Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A small persimmon tree is growing here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems to have special meaning for[n]the old couple at the bookstore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Could this be the {f 0 1 2}persimmon tree{f 0 1 27} the old[n]couple at the bookstore were talking about?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There is a fallen leaf under the tree...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A small tree is growing here.[n]I wonder what kind of tree it is...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should show this leaf to[n]the old couple at the bookstore...[n]{f 1 1}
